## Checklist

- [ ] Outline drafted
- [ ] Code samples ready
- [ ] Cover image created (`public/images/blog/<year>/<month>/`)
- [ ] Markdown file created (`content/blog/<year>/`)
- [ ] Internal links checked (`make check-links-fast`)
- [ ] Post reviewed & proofread
- [ ] Committed & pushed → CI green
